---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve SARAISE
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- SARAISE Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

**Server (please complete the following information):**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14.0]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10.12]
- Node.js Version: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- PostgreSQL Version: [e.g. 17.0]
- Redis Version: [e.g. 7.2.0]

## Logs

```
Paste relevant logs here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Security Considerations

- [ ] This bug does not involve security vulnerabilities (if it does, see [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md))
- [ ] This bug does not expose sensitive data
- [ ] This bug does not bypass authentication/authorization

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have included all relevant information
- [ ] I have tested this on the latest version of SARAISE
- [ ] I have checked the documentation for known issues
